authors: Amirdelfan K, Yu C, Doust MW, Gliner BE, Morgan DM, Kapural L, Vallejo R, Sitzman T, Yearwood TL, Bundschu R
title: Long-term QoL improvement for chronic back/leg pain using SCS: 12-month SENZA-RCT results
study_question: Does 10 kHz SCS improve long-term QoL outcomes for chronic back and leg pain patients?
population_assessed: Chronic back and leg pain patients receiving spinal cord stimulation.
outcome_measures: ODI, GAF, CGIC, PSQI, SF-MPQ-2, SF-12, remote programmer usage
inclusion_criteria: Chronic back/leg pain, randomized to 10 kHz or traditional SCS, ≥40% VAS pain reduction.
answer_to_study_question: Yes, 10 kHz SCS significantly improved QoL and functionality for chronic back and leg pain.
